title: Create some tasks for today I need to do to improve the s…

messages.content: Create some tasks for today I need to do to improve the second brain. Improve mobile ui/ensure works on mobile, add secrets page (new page where list of MCP, skills and secrets are there. Secrets are not interacted by llm(check if skills can use powershell scripts and add functionality if so), add frequently used prompts(like tasks for today), maybe can render takes for today in a seperate page as that is a good feature

Here's your task list for today — all saved to the brain! ✅

---

## 🧠 Second Brain Improvements — Today

| # | Task | Priority |
|---|------|----------|
| 1 | **Improve Mobile UI** | 🔴 High |
| 2 | **Add Secrets Page** | 🔴 High |
| 3 | **Add Frequently Used Prompts** | 🟡 Medium |
| 4 | **Tasks for Today — Dedicated Page** | 🟠 Medium-High |

---

### Quick breakdown:

**📱 Mobile UI**
Audit layout, fix overflow/touch issues, test on iOS Safari + Android Chrome.

**🔐 Secrets Page**
New settings page with three sections: MCP Servers, Skills, Secrets. Secrets are **never sent to the LLM** — masked by default with show/hide toggle. Includes an investigation item: **check if skills support PowerShell scripts** and add the functionality if they do.

**⚡ Frequently Used Prompts**
Save prompts like *"tasks for today"* and fire them in one click. Accessible from the chat input (e.g. `/` shortcut). Stretch goal: variable placeholders like `{date}`.

**📋 Tasks for Today Page**
A dedicated page that queries the brain for today's task nodes and renders them as a checklist — no LLM round-trip needed. Great daily dashboard feature.

---

5 nodes saved (1 journal overview + 4 individual task nodes). You can ask *"what are my tasks for today?"* to recall this list anytime.

---

### 🔢 Token Counter — Details
- **Location:** Top right of the Agent Activity panel
- **Shows:** Tokens used / model token limit (e.g. `4,821 / 200,000`)
- **Progress indicator:** Bar or ratio so you can see context fill at a glance
- **Compaction estimate:** e.g. *"Compacts at ~80% — 2,400 tokens away"*
- **Live updates** as agent streams responses
- **Colour coded:** 🟢 <50% · 🟡 50–80% · 🔴 >80%
